Sher.title: Sher
Sher.description: A couplet or poetic verse saved by a user in their personal Deewan notebook

id.description: Unique identifier for the saved sher

urdu.description: The Urdu script representation of the couplet

roman.description: The transliterated Roman text of the couplet

english.description: The English translation of the couplet

poet.description: The name of the poet who composed the couplet

isUserAdded.description: Whether this is an original user composition

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved this couplet

createdAt.description: When the couplet was saved to the database

ZauqVideo.title: ZauqVideo
ZauqVideo.description: A video curated by the administrator representing classical performances (Qawwali, Ghazal recitation, Sitar performance)

id.description: Unique identifier for the curated video

artist.description: The artist, poet, or reciter featured in the video

url.description: The URL of the video (e.g., YouTube video page, embed link, or stream)

description.description: An optional description or context for the performance

category.description: The style or genre of the video (e.g. Qawwali, Recitation, Sitar Solo, Ghazal Singing)

createdAt.description: When the video record was added to the database

Author.title: Author
Author.description: A classical Urdu poet or literary figure with biographical details and bibliography

birthPlace.description: Birthplace or origin of the author

imageUrl.description: URL or local path to a profile image or painting

isLocalImage.description: Whether the image is hosted locally

createdAt.description: When the author profile was created

Book.title: Book
Book.description: A classic printed book, manuscript, or compilation of works belonging to an author

authorId.description: The unique ID of the author who penned this book

description.description: An introductory description or summary of the book

coverImageUrl.description: URL or local path of the book cover

isLocalCover.description: Whether the book cover image is hosted locally

audioUrl.description: Audio performance URL or audiobook local path

isLocalAudio.description: Whether the audio is hosted locally

videoUrl.description: URL of a reading or performance video associated with the book

videoType.description: The source type of the video stream

files.description: List of attached literary documents and ebook publications

averageRating.description: Average user rating of the book (0 to 5)

reviewsCount.description: Total number of reviews submitted for this book

genre.description: The literary genre of the book (e.g. Ghazal, Marsiya, Prose)

literaryPeriod.description: The literary era or period of the book (e.g. Classical, Modern)

createdAt.description: When the book record was registered

BookProgress.title: BookProgress
BookProgress.description: User progress tracker for classical books (reading and listening)

listenProgress.description: Percentage of book listened to (0 to 100)

lastUpdated.description: When the progress was last recorded

DailyCouplet.title: DailyCouplet
DailyCouplet.description: A curated couplet representing either a general Sher or a classical elegiac Mersiya verse, set for a specific date or active rotation

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily couplet

urdu.description: The Urdu script representation of the couplet

roman.description: The transliterated Roman text of the couplet

english.description: The English translation of the couplet

poet.description: The name of the poet who composed the couplet

activeDate.description: Specific date this couplet is scheduled for (YYYY-MM-DD), or empty/generic

BookReview.title: BookReview
BookReview.description: A text-based review or commentary posted by an authenticated user for a classic book

bookId.description: The unique ID of the book being reviewed

userId.description: The UID of the user who composed this review

userName.description: The display name of the user who posted the review

text.description: The text content of the review

rating.description: Optional aesthetic star rating from 1 to 5

updatedAt.description: When the review was last updated

GlobalSettings.title: GlobalSettings
GlobalSettings.description: Global layout, typography, banner and branding configuration set by the admin

CMSPage.title: CMSPage
CMSPage.description: Custom content management pages such as about-us and privacy-policy

id.description: The unique slug for the page (e.g., 'about-us' or 'privacy-policy')

title.description: The user-facing title of the page

content.description: The markdown or rich-text content of the page

updatedAt.description: When the page was last updated

cms_pages/{pageId}.description: Content management pages created or updated by the administrator

settings/{settingId}.description: App personalization and brand settings set by administrator

books/{bookId}/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Collection of reviews posted by users on classical books

users/{userId}/saved_shers/{sherId}.description: Collection of poetic verses saved or composed by the user

users/{userId}/book_progress/{bookId}.description: Reading and listening progress of classical books for the user

videos/{videoId}.description: Global collection of curated classical and performance videos

authors/{authorId}.description: Global collection of classical Urdu literary authors

books/{bookId}.description: Global collection of classical books and literary publications

daily_couplets/{coupletId}.description: Global collection of curated daily poetic inspirations managed by the administrator
